content:
type: STATUS
files: src/jinja2/ext.py
summary: Completed domain param support: parse() gains a domain branch (before assign/trimmed checks) consuming domain="literal" with TemplateAssertionError on duplicate/non-string, _make_node gains domain kwarg (last positional, default None) selecting dgettext/dngettext, and _install_callables/_install/_uninstall gain dgettext/dngettext plumbing with fallback wrappers. My local diff shows no metadata changes present, so we appear to be on separate copies -- flagging in case merge happens later.
